Services / Dental Care

Dental Care

  • Dental exams and with oral cancer screening
  • Regular and deep cleanings
  • Fillings
  • Fluoride treatments
  • Dentures
  • Crowns and bridges
  • Root canals
  • Oral surgery including extractions
  • Space maintainers
Dental care is an important part of your whole health, which is why it’s important to see your dentist regularly. We understand that dental visits can be a source of anxiety for many people. That’s why our caring, professional dentistry team ensures you feel as comfortable as possible every time you visit–even if it has been a long time since you last saw a dentist.
